query: Ugh the utility room is so cold and so dark when I go grab the laundry my hands get cold and I end up squinting at the bottles makes me slow and a bit annoyed

action_input.answer: I checked the utility room. The current temperature is 25.98°C (not cold), but I understand you feel cold. Unfortunately, there are no devices in the utility room to adjust temperature or provide lighting. The only devices present are a laundry washer and two dryers.
